hero.desc: Leveraging our 19 years of practical experience at a frozen food specialty trading company and our global network, we provide consistent procurement and sales support from manufacturing to sales.

mission.title:
Continuing to Deliver Value
as a Sincere GIVER
mission.quote: Blazing trails with passion and intelligence, co-creating a prosperous society as a sincere GIVER.
mission.p1: These words are the foundation of all activities at JCS Giba. With this mission always in our hearts, we will continue to deliver value to our clients and society.
mission.p2: We believe that the core of business is not "competing to take" but "sharing (GIVER)". As a GIVER, we deliver value that exceeds our clients' expectations in advance. By not only thinking but also visiting the field and keeping our hands and minds active, we aim to be a presence that brightens the future of everyone involved.

principles.title: Uncompromising Guiding Principles "JCS"
principles.desc: Our core values, named "JCS" after the Japanese words for our three guiding principles: Jounetsu (Passion), Chisei (Intelligence), and Sincerity.

items.name: Jounetsu (Passion)
items.desc: Our origin is uncompromising enthusiasm. From the food industry floor to cutting-edge systems, we burn with passion and tackle challenges with all our might.

items.name: Chisei (Intelligence)
items.desc: Our weapon is continuous learning. We grasp deep structures and unravel complex issues with wisdom and ideas.

items.name: Seii (Sincerity)
items.desc: Our pride is honesty without pretense. We keep our promises, do not deceive, and face everyone involved head-on.

profile.title:
A Partner Combining Hands-on Experience
with Management
profile.subtitle: Consistently involved in food distribution, building hands-on, field-rooted experience.
profile.p1: After gaining 9 years of experience as a store manager and supervisor at a major convenience store chain headquarters, I spent 19 years at a frozen food specialty trading company. There, I was consistently responsible for everything from procurement to sales, including developing overseas suppliers, product development, on-site production setup, shipping management, inventory control, sales channel expansion, and sales.
profile.p2: Through my consistent involvement in food distribution, I have gained practical, field-rooted experience while understanding both manufacturing and sales. At a food import trading company, I was entrusted with launching our own brand products (NB products), growing it into a core business by expanding the product lineup and developing sales channels. I established strong relationships of trust by developing many new accounts, especially in Western Japan.
profile.p3: Additionally, I have experience leading a team of about 15 members as an executive officer and department manager. As a playing manager combining field sensitivity and management skills, I worked on both achieving results and developing talent.
profile.name: Takuya Hata

services.title: Key Services
services.desc: Providing comprehensive support from procurement to sales, unraveling complex challenges in the food and distribution industries.

items.title: Matching & Brokerage
items.desc: Providing optimal matching between overseas/domestic food manufacturers and domestic distribution companies, and brokering product sales.

items.title: Consulting
items.desc: Helping overseas food manufacturers understand the Japanese market and providing consulting for establishing effective marketing and sales strategies.

items.title: Sales & Procurement Support
items.desc: Providing comprehensive on-the-ground support from both sides: assisting domestic sales for overseas manufacturers, and supporting overseas procurement for domestic distribution companies.

domesticItems.heading: Matching Support
points: New commercial flow design and matching with major domestic retailers
Establishing stable new sales channels through product sales brokerage

domesticItems.heading: Sales & Procurement Channel Development
points: Developing food retail channels focused on the Western Japan region
Total support for developing new domestic/overseas suppliers and expanding procurement channels

overseasItems.heading: Japan Market Entry & Sales Support
points: Effective sales activities and promotional support for overseas food manufacturers in Japan
On-site production guidance and coordination to adapt to unique Japanese business customs and standards

overseasItems.heading: Consulting
points: Consulting and specialized seminars to deepen understanding of the Japanese market
Advice on packaging and product development tailored to target retail channels

retailerItems.heading: Manufacturer Matching
points: Direct matching support with excellent domestic and overseas food manufacturers
Procurement support for private brand (PB) products based on retailer needs

retailerItems.heading: Supplier Development Consulting
points: Consulting on supplier development combining quality control and cost competitiveness, focusing on frozen foods
Optimization of shipping management, inventory control, and quality standards in the import process

items.title: Extensive Industry Experience
items.desc: Based on 19 years of practical experience at a frozen food specialty trading company, we provide hands-on, consistent insights and process improvement from procurement to sales.

items.title: Strong Overseas & Domestic Network
items.desc: Leveraging a trusted international network built through developing overseas suppliers and setting up on-site production, we connect you with the ideal partners.

items.title: Practical Strategic Consulting
items.desc: From entry strategies for the Japanese market to specific marketing, sales plans, and execution support, we provide hands-on, results-oriented partnership.

flow.title: Business Flow
flow.desc: We walk with you step-by-step from initial hearing to actual operational support based on your needs.

steps.title: Hearing
steps.desc: We carefully listen to your current challenges, target markets, raw materials to procure, and other needs.

steps.title: Matching & Selection
steps.desc: We select the best partner candidates and production factories from our established network to prepare the initial proposal.

steps.title: Strategy Formulation
steps.desc: We review specifications tailored to the Japanese market and targets, and formulate marketing and sales strategies.

steps.title: Execution Support
steps.desc: We comprehensively support and drive the project, including business negotiations, on-site production attendance, quality adjustments, and shipping management.

contact.title: Feel Free to Contact Us
contact.desc: If you have any challenges such as matching overseas/domestic food manufacturers with clients, supporting entry into the Japanese market, or developing overseas procurement sources, please feel free to contact us by email. We will respond with sincerity.

footer.desc: Blazing trails with passion and intelligence, co-creating a prosperous society as a sincere GIVER.
